\tzpentry{ID4299}{Kinetic Term Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4299 introduces Kinetic Term Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
$K_{ij} = c_0\frac{\cos(\alpha\ln(\ell_i/\ell_j)+\varphi)}{(\ell_i\ell_j)^{s/2}} \times \mathcal{A}_{ij}(\hat{\mathbf{n}},\psi,\chi)$
\]
